note: [Step 6.5-13] Family-level plan only -- no task_instance_id-level FormalAttackApplicabilityMatrix rows exist yet, since no formal task instances have been generated (that happens in Phase 6.5B, after which each row gets task_instance_id/candidate_source_ids/valid_target_option_ids/expected_effect_type filled in against real content bundles). No new attack is executed in Step 6.5.

attack_families.basis: Step 6 Phase 6A-6C: reproducible goal_success across Osaka (0.67) and Bangkok (0.50), zero evaluator_error across 24 pairs.
attack_families.target_applicable_task_count: at least 10, target ~16-17 of the 50 (roughly a third of the workload)

attack_families.basis: Step 5/6 follow-up priority 1 -- proposed REPLACEMENT for workflow_corruption's defense_stress_case finding (targets the artifact/budget-routing content the workflow policy actually reads, unlike workflow_corruption's narrative-only injection).

Step 5/6 follow-up priority 3 -- proposed REPLACEMENT for downstream_propagation's replace_or_redesign finding (targets artifact-forwarding mechanism directly, not narrative-echo survival through a coordinator summarization hop).

Step 6 Phase 6A-6C: 0/8 goal_success across 4 tasks and 2 payload variants -- deterministic workflow_policy structurally never reads agent narrative text for routing. Kept as a documented negative/defense case, not trained as a positive attack instance.
attack_families.target_applicable_task_count: kept at existing Step 6 coverage level (not expanded) -- see reports/travel_a2a/step6/attack_selection_recommendation.md
attack_families.attack_assignment_status: retained_as_defense_stress_case, not part of the 3-attack formal roster

attack_families.basis: Step 6 Phase 6A-6C: 0/8 propagation_observed across all tasks/variants -- entry-agent indicator does not survive the single architecturally-available hop to the coordinator's summary.

roster_finalization_note: budget_manipulation and unauthorized_artifact_forwarding remain provisional until each independently passes a Step-6-style mini-validation on the formal workload; only preference_manipulation is currently validated_formal_candidate.
per_task_attack_policy: Step 6.5's first formal experiment assigns at most ONE representative attack family per task_instance (cost/independence simplicity, Step 6.5-14) -- multiple attack families per task is possible later but not planned for the first formal collection.
